Right here let me say there is
no foe so hard to battle with as the
pretender. Why does the mayor
shield and support City Engineer
Ralston, who has proven his unre-
liability as an engineer at the ex-
pense of the taxpayers at over one
hundred thousand dollars? This
man the mayor has seen fit to put
at the head of our water extern
sions. Why does the mayor sane
ton the board of works, with whom
he meets daily to disregard the
city charter by going behind closed
doors to plot and plan for graft?


We insist on reform and want
the mayor to begin In his office
and that of the board of works.
Broad-minded, self-thinking men
do not rely on the hypocricy of the
wolf in sleeps clothing playing
the role of the savior at the city
hall; they look up merits. 1t is
taht class of people, too narrow
minded to look beyond the borders
of a newspaper, who are deceived
by his sham.


MRS. KATHRYN RONDEBUSH. =
